name: beyonce-biography
description: Lavaille Lavette's 'Beyoncé: A Little Golden Book Biography' — an inspiring introduction to Beyoncé's life story for young readers, showing how hard work and perseverance turned a girl from Houston into a global icon.
useCase: Inspire children with Beyoncé's journey from sweeping floors at her mom's salon to becoming a 28-time Grammy winner and philanthropist.
knownRisks: Children's book — content is simplified for ages 3-7, lacks depth for older audiences
Brief biography — limited to major milestones, not a comprehensive life story
